issues.title: Multiple H1 tags on same page (SEO violation)
issues.message: SEO mandate requires exactly ONE <h1> per page. Sub-sections must use <h2> or below. Multiple H1 tags confuse search engine heading hierarchy.
issues.code: <h1 class="sr-only" style="position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0); white-space: nowrap; border-width: 0;">Niagara Home Improvem

issues.title: TypeScript config missing strict mode
issues.message: SOTA 2026 TypeScript baseline requires strict: true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true, and exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true in tsconfig.json for maximum type safety.

issues.title: TypeScript config missing strict mode
issues.message: SOTA 2026 TypeScript baseline requires strict: true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true, and exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true in tsconfig.json for maximum type safety.

issues.title: Universal selector
issues.message: Universal selector (*) is slow. Target specific elements.

issues.title: a11y-small-touch-target
issues.message: Accessibility: Touch targets must be minimum 44x44px. Use min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or p-3

issues.title: Magic number in blur/opacity (GS-DESIGN-001)
issues.message: Use CSS variables (e.g., --glass-blur, --glass-opacity) instead of hardcoded magic numbers for design tokens.

issues.title: a11y-small-touch-target
issues.message: Accessibility: Touch targets must be minimum 44x44px. Use min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or p-3

issues.title: Magic number in blur/opacity (GS-DESIGN-001)
issues.message: Use CSS variables (e.g., --glass-blur, --glass-opacity) instead of hardcoded magic numbers for design tokens.

issues.title: Image missing alt attribute
issues.message: All images must have an alt attribute for accessibility (WCAG 1.1.1).

issues.title: UI-A11Y-IMG-ALT
issues.message: Image without `alt` text. Add descriptive alt text for accessibility.
issues.fixHint: BEFORE:

issues.title: Image without alt attribute
issues.message: Images require alt text for accessibility. Use alt="" for decorative images.
issues.fixHint: alt="Description of image"

issues.title: Component exceeds 300 lines
issues.message: Large components are hard to maintain. Split into smaller, focused components.
issues.fixHint: Extract sub-components

issues.title: Icon/SVG in flex container without flex-shrink-0
issues.message: Icons inside flex containers will squish on narrow viewports. Add flex-shrink-0 (Tailwind: shrink-0) and explicit width/height to prevent distortion.

issues.title: nextjs16-image-unoptimized
issues.message: Next.js: Use next/image for automatic image optimization (WebP, lazy loading, responsive)

issues.title: vibe-parent-blindness
issues.message: SOTA Master Protocol: AUDIT PARENT HIERARCHY. Check ancestor max-w and overflow before centering.
